brand_identity.name: EchoBiz
brand_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion of Traditional Bahi-Khata Trust with Swiss Minimalist Clarity
brand_identity.target_audience: Small shopkeepers, kirana store owners, nano businesses in India

primary_mic.styles: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 h-20 w-20 rounded-full bg-orange-600 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white z-50 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all duration-300

action_card.styles: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-white border border-stone-100 shadow-sm rounded-2xl active:bg-stone-50 transition-colors gap-3 h-32

transaction_item.styles: flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm

summary_widget.styles: bg-stone-900 text-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden

voice_text_display.styles: w-full min-h-[120px] text-2xl font-medium text-stone-800 bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-stone-300 resize-none text-center

images.description: Friendly elderly shopkeeper/Munim-ji for trust on login page
Pile of Indian coins for financial prosperity visuals
Fresh market produce for inventory background

interactions.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text is APCA compliant. Use dark grey (stone-900) on off-white (stone-50).
accessibility.text_size: Scale up text by 10% compared to standard SaaS apps.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' font for everything. Import it in index.css.
Do not use gradients for text.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Shadows should be soft and warm: shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(28,25,23,0.1)].
Always use the 'data-testid' attribute for interactive elements.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds for overlays; use blur or semi-opaque fills.
